name: preprocessorForIMazingBackend
description: NestJS microservice that normalizes iMazing WhatsApp export paths.

scripts.build: rimraf dist tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && tsc -p tsconfig.json --incremental false
scripts.arch:graph: mkdir -p doc/architecture && depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs src/main --output-type dot | dot -T svg > doc/architecture/dependency-graph.svg

author: OpenAI
